problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
